texto: Jewellery's not a big thing for me. The only thing I wear is a gold cross on a chain that I got for my 21st birthday. You have to take it off every day for filming, but that's the only time I'm not wearing it. You won't find me in rings, bracelets or earrings.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jonas Armstrong sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Jewellery's not a big thing for me. The only thing I wear is a gold cross on a chain that I got f…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, time, day, útil em momentos de aniversario e day.

frase_original: Jewellery's not a big thing for me. The only thing I wear is a gold cross on a chain that I got for my 21st birthday. You have to take it off every day for filming, but that's the only time I'm not wearing it. You won't find me in rings, bracelets or earrings.
